location: Dropped by Anastasia, Tarnished-Eater when she invades you approaching the Corpse-Stench Shack on Mt. Gelmir (her second of three invasions). The weapon comes pre-infused with Sacred affinity.
tactics: She invades the first time you approach the Corpse-Stench Shack — clear the surrounding Rotten Strays first so you aren't fighting her and trash mobs together
You can skip most of the path's enemies by hugging the mountain's edge on the left as you approach
This is her 2nd invasion of 3 (the others happen elsewhere and later at Consecrated Snowfield) — don't mistake a different encounter for this one
She's faster and more aggressive than her bulky weapon suggests; don't expect slow greataxe-style tells
lore: The signature weapon of Ogress Anastasia, an invader who hunted Tarnished while posing as a Finger Maiden. It's an oversized carving blade built for taking apart a human body, and it draws a sip of the victim's vitality with every solid hit.

builds.name: Dex-leaning heavy weapon
builds.why: Lowest Strength requirement (16/11) of any Greataxe with C-rank Dexterity scaling, letting Dex builds two-hand a heavy weapon cheaply.

builds.name: Aggressive lifesteal brawler
builds.why: Passive heals ~1% max HP per hit, which stacks well with fast multi-hit skills like Wild Strikes.
